category_sources: source_facts.description says wmbusmeters reads wired or wireless M-Bus protocols to acquire utility meter readings; official README describes collecting and publishing meter readings.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and the official GitHub repository name use wmbusmeters.
docs_sources: Official README links to wmbusmeters.github.io as FAQ/WIKI/MANUAL pages and also contains usage and configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe wired/wireless M-Bus meter acquisition, driver decoding, and publishing via MQTT, REST, database, or logs.
